nikah.location: 8-2-703, Road No. 12, Bhola Nagar, Banjara Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana 500028

gathering.location: Nanal Nagar, Langar Houz, Hyderabad, Telangana 500008
gathering.message: You are warmly invited to a small gathering with close family and friends following the Nikah.

notes.walima: The Walima will be held at a later date, Insha'Allah. Details will be shared in due time.

dua.arabic: بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكُمَا وَبَارَكَ عَلَيْكُمَا وَجَمَعَ بَيْنَكُمَا فِي خَيْرٍ
dua.transliteration: Barakallahu lakuma wa baraka 'alaikuma wa jama'a baynakuma fi khayr.
